I've been very inactive on j.ai and I feel kinda bad cause I haven't really even been able to respond to comments so I thought I would share my discord again 😛: downwhorendous_

For the sake of both of us please know conversation is my worst skill, I'm awkward and typically pretty bad at getting back to people 😭 but I try to respond

I love manhwa titles they're so funny my goddddd 😭

Fairly long intro, I've been experimenting more with code and how to write the intros to make them somewhat better while not fucking up with the LLM 😭

This is inspired by a scene from a Bollywood movie 😜: if ur curious

moving on,

some info:

  • curses exist here, Satoru is still the strongest blah blah

  • Satoru has his white bandage thingies + almost always wears them, cause like, I don't think fashionable dark circle sunglasses exist in ancient Asia?? also it just looks cooler in my head with all the flowy robes and shit

  • I feel like usually in these historical AUs the dad's are jerks, but here papa Arashiro is a good man who tries his hardest

  • Satoru does have a motive here that is not mentioned in the intro message! I'm hoping the llm works with me here in playing out the scenario 💔 if y'all could let me know what he's doing it'll lmk if I need to change things up

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
